description: Public workflow library. Each workflow is a step-by-step procedure for a repeatable process. Stored as markdown files in workflows/.

workflows.title: Assign task to bender
workflows.trigger: When delegating work to a bender agent

workflows.title: Update bender context
workflows.trigger: After bender completes work; update capability registry

workflows.title: Review bender deliverable
workflows.trigger: When bender signals delivery; before accepting output

workflows.title: Onboard a new brand or client
workflows.trigger: When setting up a new brand context

workflows.title: Create card branch
workflows.trigger: When starting implementation work on a card

workflows.title: Promote card to production
workflows.trigger: When a card is approved and ready to ship

workflows.title: Build context package for bender
workflows.trigger: Before dispatching a complex bender task

workflows.title: Council governance review
workflows.trigger: Periodic health check; before major decisions

workflows.title: Set up governance council
workflows.trigger: First-time setup of governance constructs

workflows.title: Council session
workflows.trigger: Strategic planning, meta-framework decisions, pivots

workflows.title: Set up data layer
workflows.trigger: When initializing database or schema for a project

workflows.title: Log a decision
workflows.trigger: After making a significant architectural or strategic decision

workflows.title: Configure delegation policy
workflows.trigger: When setting autonomy levels and guardrails

workflows.title: Development pipeline SOP
workflows.trigger: Reference: standard operating procedure for dev work

workflows.title: Pick up async Discord thread
workflows.trigger: When resuming an async conversation or bender update

workflows.title: Send email
workflows.trigger: When sending email via API

workflows.title: Convert slides to web format
workflows.trigger: When converting PPTX to HTML presentation

workflows.title: Create web presentation from scratch
workflows.trigger: When building a new HTML slide deck

workflows.title: Review and commit changes
workflows.trigger: Before committing: review diff, write message, push

workflows.title: Sync git branches
workflows.trigger: When syncing feature branch with main/master

workflows.title: Construct bender team (HIVE)
workflows.trigger: When a project needs a multi-agent team

workflows.title: Set up identity context
workflows.trigger: Loading or calibrating CoS or bender identity

workflows.title: Maintain index files
workflows.trigger: After adding/removing files; keep INDEX.md current

workflows.title: Wire up integration
workflows.trigger: When connecting an external API or service

workflows.title: Set up kanban board
workflows.trigger: When initializing a new project board

workflows.title: Promote database migration
workflows.trigger: When applying schema changes to production

workflows.title: Set up monitoring
workflows.trigger: When adding observability to a service

workflows.title: Plan review gate
workflows.trigger: Before executing a plan; mandatory critical review

workflows.title: Production deployment gate
workflows.trigger: Before shipping to production; quality checklist

workflows.title: Batch release to production
workflows.trigger: When promoting multiple cards in one release

workflows.title: Write release notes
workflows.trigger: After a release; document what shipped

workflows.title: RFC process
workflows.trigger: When proposing a significant change for review

workflows.title: Consolidate session learnings
workflows.trigger: At end of work session; capture insights

workflows.title: Session handoff
workflows.trigger: End of day / wrapping up; preserve context for next session

workflows.title: Resume session
workflows.trigger: Start of day / new session; restore context

workflows.title: Emit learning signal
workflows.trigger: After completing work; record signal for improvement loop
workflows.note: Learning pipeline not yet active. Activation path: implement signal consumer in product backend.

workflows.title: Initialize sprint
workflows.trigger: When starting a new sprint

workflows.title: Sprint review
workflows.trigger: At sprint close; review outcomes, capture learnings

workflows.title: Sprint vision review
workflows.trigger: Strategic alignment check for sprint goals

workflows.title: Bootstrap system
workflows.trigger: First-time setup of workspace from scratch

workflows.title: System playbook
workflows.trigger: Reference: how this workspace operates

workflows.title: Load task batch
workflows.trigger: When importing a batch of cards at sprint start

workflows.title: Commit task work
workflows.trigger: When a task is complete; commit + update card

workflows.title: Task interview
workflows.trigger: When a task needs more definition before work begins

workflows.title: Onboard bender team member
workflows.trigger: When adding a new bender identity to the team

workflows.title: Create template
workflows.trigger: When standardizing a repeating file structure

workflows.title: Test template
workflows.trigger: After creating a template; validate it works

workflows.title: Transition card between lanes
workflows.trigger: When moving a card to in_progress, review, or done

workflows.title: Web app development workflow
workflows.trigger: Reference: standard patterns for webapp feature development

categories.sessions: Start/end of work session — context preservation and resumption
categories.planning: Sprint management, task definition, backlog grooming
categories.delegation: Bender assignment, context packages, team construction
categories.governance: Council reviews, decisions, policy, plan gates
categories.setup: First-time initialization of systems, identities, and templates
categories.learning: Signal emission and knowledge capture (signal-emit currently inactive)
